title: vigethia mexicana
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", Vicia mexicana benefits include various biological activities such as antioxidant, antiinflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
side_effects: Vigethia mexicana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and even photosensitivity. In rare cases, consuming large quantities of Vigethia mexicana can lead to more severe health issues, including liver and kidney damage. If not handled correctly, the plant's volatile oils can also cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma attacks.
